content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月13日 周一
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide](https://github.com/mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide)
   Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software developme | ⭐691
2. [William-Lu-stack/LuxyAI](https://github.com/William-Lu-stack/LuxyAI)
   AgenticOps for Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure. | ⭐436
3. [MDX-Tom/gpt-5.6-instruct](https://github.com/MDX-Tom/gpt-5.6-instruct)
   A Codex CLI jailbreak prompt and test pack for gpt-5.6-sol. 针对 gpt-5.6 系列的 Codex | ⭐397
4. [cosmtrek/mindwalk](https://github.com/cosmtrek/mindwalk)
   A visualization tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your code | ⭐380
5. [yetone/kill-ai-slop](https://github.com/yetone/kill-ai-slop)
   A field guide to the visual & copy tics of AI-generated products — and an Agent  | ⭐364
6. [AlephAITech/WorkBuddyGuide](https://github.com/AlephAITech/WorkBuddyGuide)
   A practical, open-source guide to mastering WorkBuddy through real-world workflo | ⭐326
7. [pengchujin/jzsub](https://github.com/pengchujin/jzsub)
   JZSub — 一条视频链接，自动交付最高画质、封面和 GPT 双语字幕 MP4。 | ⭐246
8. [dongguatanglinux/grok-build-auth](https://github.com/dongguatanglinux/grok-build-auth)
   Protocol research client: x.ai signup → SSO → Grok Build OAuth → CLIProxyAPI aut | ⭐204

## 🤗 Hugging Face 热门模型
1. [meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct)
   Meta最新Llama 3.1大模型 | ❤️0
2. [Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct)
   阿里Qwen 2.5系列 | ❤️0
3. [THUDM/glm-4-9b-chat](https://huggingface.co/THUDM/glm-4-9b-chat)
   智谱GLM-4 | ❤️0
4. [microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct](https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct)
   微软Phi-3小模型 | ❤️0
5. [openai/whisper-large-v3](https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-large-v3)
   OpenAI Whisper语音识别 | ❤️0

- [量子位](https://www.qbitai.com/) [AI资讯]
- [机器之心](https://www.jiqizhixin.com/) [AI技术]

**国外：**

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
